synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20946 Oracle Linux 9 dnf-plugins-core bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20946
description:
[4.3.0-24.0.1]
- Added kernel uek and uek core into needs restart list [Orabug: 35860693]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35378252]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35366472]
- repoclosure - raise exception for typos in repository name [Orabug: 33074226]

[4.3.0-24]
- Rename dnf4-multisig(8) manual page to dnf-multisig(8) (RHEL-117134)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20946

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20946.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
dnf-plugins-core-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-leaves-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-modulesync-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-multisig-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-post-transaction-actions-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-show-leaves-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-versionlock-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugins-core-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
yum-utils-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
dnf-plugins-core-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-leaves-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-modulesync-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-multisig-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-post-transaction-actions-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-show-leaves-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugin-versionlock-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
python3-dnf-plugins-core-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
yum-utils-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/dnf-plugins-core-4.3.0-24.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4.3.0-24.0.1]
- Added kernel uek and uek core into needs restart list [Orabug: 35860693]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35378252]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35366472]
- repoclosure - raise exception for typos in repository name [Orabug: 33074226]

[4.3.0-24]
- Rename dnf4-multisig(8) manual page to dnf-multisig(8) (RHEL-117134)
